text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On my day off, I pay a visit to the school library.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "The Five-Star Italian Compendium" and "The Ultimate
Chinese Culinary Challenge"? Hmm, these aren't really what I had in
mind...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh! "Energizing Meals Made Easy"? That sounds in the right ballpark.
Yeah, I think I'll check out this one today—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Teach?! Why're you here? Didja come to stock up on stuff to
read like me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Noticing a book in Hishi Amazon's hands, I ask her what it's about.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this? It's a cookbook. You can only grow your repertoire so much
on your own, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes I check out stuff like this to really step up my culinary
game. 'Cause I don't just read the recipes—I actually make 'em.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So c'mon, Teach! We're gonna go load up on the ingredients listed in
this book!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Kay, grab a shopping cart, and I'll start tossin' stuff in! First up is
pumpkin, then fish sauce... Huh, I've never used these before.
choice_data_list: You must know a lot about cooking.
You must know a lot about cooking.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You bet! I do it every day! Then I give my power-packed provisions to
the youngsters. Feels good to see 'em scarf them down.
choice_data_list: So it's a hobby of yours?
So it's a hobby of yours?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A hobby? Well, I guess you could call it that. But it's not really about
the cooking itself...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, Teach, you seem really into this. Does that mean you cook
too?
choice_data_list: Yeah, I can hold my own.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! So what you're saying is...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You've been acting all casual, but you're actually my rival! This whole
time, you were just playing dumb!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Dammit! Then that means I just showed my whole hand to the
competition! Argh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. I'll lay all my cards down on the table and still score a
crushing victory! That's how ol' Hishiama gets stuff done!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? The two of us are both whizzes in the kitchen. So
there's only one thing to do! Have a one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
As fellow travelers down the path of cuisine, we won't be satisfied 'til
we prove who's best, right?
choice_data_list: Not sure that applies to me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Aww, c'mon, have some guts. Finding out that you cook too really lit a
fire under me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's good for us Umas and our trainers to square off on the same field
once in a while, don'tcha think? So let's have a cook-off!

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
We have the entire cafeteria to ourselves, so that means it's cook-off
time!

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
In one corner, we have our dorm leader—the iron maiden of the
kitchen, Hishiama! All of us can vouch for her cooking skills.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Just so you know, I won't be holding back.

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And in the other corner, we have Hishiama's trainer. If you want to
win, you'll have to serve up something that seriously tickles my taste
buds! Ooh, I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't hijack our match just to stuff yourself!

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, let my stomach get the better of me for a minute there...

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's get back to it. In this battle of teacher and student, it's
eat or be eaten! Let the cook-off... begin!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Aw yeeeah! It's on, Teach! Take that, and that! Gotta get that pot
simmering! Bubble, bubble, bubble!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what's the problem? That's just the way I get into it. Doesn't it
help heat things up?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: You'd better get rolling too. Let's see what you can really do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a fiery cooking session, we set our dishes side by side on
the table.

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Now then, it's time to taste the submissions. Here we have the
trainer's dish—cheese and carrot gratin topped with honey.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! You totally sold your soul, Teach! Look at you stuffing your dish with popular ingredients just to pander to the judge!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Curse you, junk food cook!
Tch, whatever. Go on and taste it already.

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am. Munch, munch... Mmm, yum! It's melting in my mouth! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I'd better try a bite too... No, scratch that! My pride won't
allow it.

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Next up is Hishiama's entry—lightly simmered pumpkin and...
mincemeat?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It's a brand-new recipe I found in a book. I know it looks
plain, but just try it.

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am. Munch, munch... ...This flavor!

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text: It's super plain! Not only does it look plain, it tastes plain too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you don't have to say it like that! Argh... Guess it doesn't have
much impact compared to Teach's junk food.

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh... But wait a minute. The flavor...

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
It's plain, but there's something else there... Feels like I'm being
warmed up from the inside...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, looks like you finally noticed! That's my secret weapon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You should try it too, Teach. I'm sure it'll strike a chord with you. Trust
me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking a spoonful of the stew, I feel the delicate flavor spreading
through my body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of being delicious, her cooking is thoughtfully prepared to
cater to those who will eat it. But when I attempt to give my
compliments to the chef...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Kn-knock it off! Did you forget I'm your rival? I dunno how I'm
supposed to respond to that.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But yeah, that's what I was gettin' at earlier. You were right—my hobby is cooking. But that's not the whole story.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: My real hobby is cooking up healthy foods that'll give people energy and motivation. That goes for you too, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Tweeeeet! The judges have reached their decision. The winner of this
captivating culinary contest is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Actually, they were both delicious, so it's a tie!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What the heck?! You made it sound like I was a shoo-in for first place!

text_block_list.name: Referee Umamusume
text_block_list.text: But that melted cheese was just sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Grr, falling for such an obvious trick... Go drown yourself in boba tea
or something!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, what do we do now, Teach? Our big one-on-one ended in a
draw! How're we supposed to solve this?
choice_data_list: We'll have to have a rematch sometime!
We'll have to have a rematch sometime!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A rematch? Oh, yeah! That's right! Even if it ended in a tie this time
around, we can just do it again. We'll have plenty of chances from
here on out.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You're going down next time, Teach! You and I are partners,
but when it comes to the kitchen, we're rivals through and through!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Delighted to have found a worthy adversary in her hobby, Amazon
continues to pursue gentle flavors in her cooking—in stark contrast to
her personality.
